steps.title: Eliminate one variable
steps.content:
Subtract the second equation from the first so the $y$ terms cancel:
$$(24x+y)-(6x+y)=48-72$$
$$18x=-24$$
$$x=-\frac{4}{3}$$

steps.title: Substitute to find y
steps.content: Use $6x+y=72$ and substitute $x=-\frac{4}{3}$: $$6(-\frac{4}{3})+y=72$$ $$-8+y=72$$ $$y=80$$ The answer is 80.
